arguments.description: Specifies the input parameters for the BigQuery routine, including their names, data types, and modes (IN/OUT/INOUT).

data_governance_type.description: Specifies the type of data governance policy applied to the routine, such as access control or classification requirements.

dataset_id.description: Specifies the ID of the dataset where the routine will be created. Must exist in the specified project.

definition_body.description: Defines the SQL or JavaScript code that constitutes the logic of the routine; must be a valid function or procedure definition.

description.description: Defines the purpose or functionality of the routine, providing context for its use in BigQuery.

determinism_level.description: Specifies whether the routine is deterministic, impacting query optimization and caching. Valid values are "DETERMINISTIC" or "NOT_DETERMINISTIC".

imported_libraries.description: List of libraries to import into the routine, specified as fully-qualified names.

language.description: Specifies the programming language used for the routine, such as "SQL" or "JAVASCRIPT".

remote_function_options.description: Configuration for remote function invocation, including connection details and required parameters for accessing external services.

return_table_type.description: Specifies the output table type for the routine, required for routines that return table data.

return_type.description: Specifies the data type of the value returned by the routine; must be a valid BigQuery data type.

routine_id.description: Unique identifier for the routine, must be within the same dataset and conform to BigQuery naming conventions.

routine_type.description: Defines the type of routine, such as SCALAR_FUNCTION or PROCEDURE, specifying its functional behavior in BigQuery.

spark_options.description: Specifies optional Spark configurations for the routine, such as Spark SQL properties or execution parameters.
spark_options.type: list(object({archive_uris: optional(list(string)),connection: optional(string),container_image: optional(string),file_uris: optional(list(string)),jar_uris: optional(list(string)),main_class: optional(string),main_file_uri: optional(string),properties: optional(map(string)),py_file_uris: optional(list(string)),runtime_version: optional(string)}))

timeouts.description: Defines the timeout duration for creating, updating, or deleting the BigQuery routine, specifying the maximum amount of time allowed for each operation.
